scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply resume-api-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply resume-api-db --remote --yes
scripts.d1:init:remote: npx wrangler d1 execute resume-api-db --remote --command "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS resume_i18n_content (lang_code TEXT PRIMARY KEY, payload TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_resume_i18n_content_updated_at ON resume_i18n_content(updated_at);" --yes
scripts.d1:init:local: npx wrangler d1 execute resume-api-db --local --command "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS resume_i18n_content (lang_code TEXT PRIMARY KEY, payload TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_resume_i18n_content_updated_at ON resume_i18n_content(updated_at);"
scripts.d1:status:remote: npx wrangler d1 execute resume-api-db --remote --command "SELECT lang_code, updated_at, length(payload) AS payload_size FROM resume_i18n_content ORDER BY lang_code;" --yes
scripts.d1:status:local: npx wrangler d1 execute resume-api-db --local --command "SELECT lang_code, updated_at, length(payload) AS payload_size FROM resume_i18n_content ORDER BY lang_code;"
